output.answer:
The first book in the Wheel of Time series is titled "The Eye of the World". This was confirmed by searching for the exact title in Wikidata, which returned the correct entity associated with the book.

output.formatted:
The first book in the Wheel of Time series is titled "The Eye of the World". This was confirmed by searching for the exact title in Wikidata, which returned the correct entity associated with the book.

<answer>
The Eye of the World
</answer>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?book WHERE {
  ?book rdfs:label "The Eye of the World" @en .
}
```

| ------------- |
| wd:Q134450213 |
| wd:Q477994    |
